_comment: Stop hook: Audit modified files for console.log statements before session ends

hooks.command: echo '### Console.log Audit' && git diff --name-only HEAD 2>/dev/null | grep -E '\.(ts|tsx)$' | xargs grep -n 'console\.log' 2>/dev/null | grep -v '__tests__\|.test.\|.spec.' | head -10 && echo 'Remove console.log statements before committing.' || echo 'No console.log found in modified files.'

notes: Scans only modified .ts/.tsx files (excluding test files) for console.log statements. Reports up to 10 occurrences.
